About Beautifyisha

A refined beauty salon for radiant, confident moments.

Beautifyisha is a professional beauty salon specializing in makeup, skincare, eyebrows, facials, bridal beauty, and luxury beauty care. Every appointment is designed with thoughtful technique, soft glamour, and a calm salon experience that leaves you feeling polished and cared for.

Expert artistry

Premium care

Elegant results

Soft glamour, tailored to you.

From bridal mornings to monthly self-care, each service is calm, precise, and beautifully finished.

Services

Luxury treatments for every beauty ritual.

Choose a focused appointment or create a bespoke package for your event, routine, or transformation.

Bridal Makeup

Camera-ready glam, soft radiance, and bridal skin prep for your ceremony and celebration.

Book this service

Facial Treatment

Restorative facial rituals customized for glow, hydration, texture, and calm skin.

Book this service

Eyebrow Shaping

Precise brow mapping, shaping, and finishing for a lifted, balanced frame.

Book this service

Eyelash Extensions

Elegant lash sets from natural definition to full luxury volume.

Book this service

Hair Styling

Polished waves, sleek styling, and event-ready finishes for every occasion.

Book this service

Skincare Consultation

A thoughtful skin analysis with product guidance and a realistic care plan.

Book this service

Nail Services

Refined manicures, soft color palettes, and delicate finishing details.

Book this service

Beauty Packages

Curated service pairings for brides, birthdays, photoshoots, and self-care days.

Book this service

Gallery

A glimpse into the Beautifyisha glow.

Elegant beauty moments, soft textures, polished finishes, and a salon atmosphere made for feeling your best.

Booking

Reserve your beauty appointment.

Share the service you need, your ideal time, and any notes about the look or result you want. Beautifyisha will confirm your appointment details.

Prefer a quick message?

Use the WhatsApp button in the form for faster booking and consultation requests.
